pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Combines SwiGLU, value-residual/gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time tuning atop the thwu1 base to sharpen per-layer control and evaluation robustness.
output.valOnlyReasoning: AdamW test-time training runs on validation tokens before each evaluation.
techniques: SwiGLU plus per-layer value-residual and gated attention control
XSA on final layers paired with EMA shadow weights
AdamW test-time tuning on validation tokens
